name: guardforge
description: GuardForge — a guardian-agent team + real Claude Code hooks that review code & build changes and gate them PASS / PASS-WITH-FIXES / BLOCK. Guardians cover security (secrets, injection), quality (tests, hallucinated APIs), integrity/compliance (licenses, PII/GDPR) and safety/ethics (red-line veto); a triage scanner runs the deterministic checks the hooks fire. Defensive by design — detects and advises, never writes exploits. Bilingual RO/EN.
